title: RJF Stock Raymond James Financial (RJF, $169.46) was a top quarterly gainer, rising +23.46%
author: tickeron_community
selftext: [Raymond James Financial](https://tickeron.com/ticker/RJF/) ([RJF](https://tickeron.com/ticker/RJF/), $169.46) was one of top quarterly gainers, jumping +23.46% to $169.46 per share. A.I.dvisor analyzed 159 stocks in the [Investment Banks/Brokers](https://tickeron.com/tags/all/Industry-InvestmentBanksBrokers) Industry over the last three months, and discovered that 142 of them (89.58%) charted an Uptrend while 17 of them (10.42%) trended down.
